programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: A female diving student plots revenge after Mike kicks her out of his diving class

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Gen Savage is suspected by Scotland Yard of killing a pretty model in her flat and even he cannot remember all the events of that night

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: 1795 time periodBarnabas challenges Jeremiah to a duel which Josette and Angelique cannot prevent

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: 1795 time period While Jeremiah lays dying witchhunter Reverand Trask enters Collinwood He ties Victoria to a tree and tries to exorcise her

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan
programme.desc: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: hen funeral director Ezra Thornberry gets his very polite young nephew Bobby as a roommate he eventually learns his rude harsh behavior towards him could be fatal

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Vicious and ruthless killer Ron and his antsy wimp partner Jimmy Lee Stoler are a couple of escaped convicts on the lam from the law The dangerous duo break into a model home in search of a safe only to discover a family residing in said swanky abode

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Puritanical small town mayor Jake Purly is running for reelection on a strict platform that vehemently opposes sex and pornography However a dark secret from Purlys shady past threatens to resurface and destroy his credibility in the form of lovely escort Dr Rita de Roy

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: While investigating a series of bizarre murders Nick discovers the villain is a familiar face from his past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A racist uses a cursed antique car radio to travel back to 1954 and tries to prevent the arrest and death of his father a member of the KKK

programme.title: Prophecy
programme.desc: A government health inspector is dispatched to assess the damage a logging company is causing to a patch of forest claimed by Native Americans and comes face to face with true terror wreaking havoc in the woods

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: To avoid prosecution and to increase the value of his work an artist fakes his own death following the accidental death of one of his models Before long he goes stir crazy cooped in the loft apartment and accuses his wife of having an affair Later two ladies reluctantly agree to let a guy move into their apartment but theyre apprehensive about his intentions - for good reason

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A cop learns that an illustrator of Tales from the Crypt might have the power to make his monstrous creations come to life due to his shrewish wife

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Much to Grampas consternation George wants to join a private club known as the Loyal Order of the Mystic Nile

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Hymie is introduced to CONTROL as KAOS tries to kidnap a CONTROL scientist

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ wrecks his truck and suffers amnesia As he struggles to remember who he is and why two men are attempting to kill him he falls in love with Gypsy and works the bumper car pavilion of her uncles carnival

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed rescues a millionaires granddaughter from a runaway horse

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carols constant chattering has rung up a huge phone bill so she takes a job as a dance instructor to help cover the charges Ed gets in on the act by taking a job selling real estate over the telephone

programme.title: Hogans 311
programme.desc: Hogans 311

programme.title: Hogans 328
programme.desc: Hogans 328

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When Binghamton finds out that Parker is an old friend of a famous War Correspondent he makes Parker the Base PR Officer in the hope of becoming the subject of the Correspondents next story But Parkers plan to improve The Captains image backfires

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Gruber and the guys concoct a very tall story to try to turn Tinker into a hero so that he can win the heart of his favorite girl But the rumor of Tinkers Secret mission soon spreads throughout the South Pacific and trouble develops when glory-hungry Binghamton tries to get in on the action

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While sitting in a restaurant Gomer witnesses an automobile accident between Sergeant Carter and another driver When in court Gomer takes the oath seriously to tell the truth the whole truth and nothing but the truth

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When Gomers cousin Goober shows up in the barracks and puts on one of Gomers uniforms and then wanders the base everyone sees the name Pyle on the uniform and thinks Gomer is losing his mind

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Wrongway Feldman returns to the island not to rescue the castaways but to make the island his permanent home As a result the castaways try to trick him into returning to Hawaii and rescuing them

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways form a band for entertainment and diversion But Gilligans drumbeats are mistaken by tribes on other islands as a declaration of war

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Much to Grampas consternation George wants to join a private club known as the Loyal Order of the Mystic Nile

programme.title: Born to Win
programme.desc: A smart-mouthed junkie and loser known as JJ George Segal spends his days looking for just one more fix

programme.title: Dangerous Crossing
programme.desc: A recently married heiress Ruth Stanton Jeanne Crain embarks on a honeymoon cruise with her new husband John Bowman Carl Betz However shortly after getting on board John disappears None of the crew remember seeing him and the ships manifest has Ruth registered alone and under her maiden name Ruth wanders the boat in search of John but soon the captain and crew believe Ruth must be crazy Only kindly Dr Manning Michael Rennie takes her seriously and helps unravel the mystery

programme.title: The Crooked Web
programme.desc: A restaurant owner becomes trapped in a plot to return him to Germany for a murder committed in the war

programme.title: The Retrievers-1
programme.desc: The Retrievers-1

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The Police ask Gadget to investigate a series of robberies that they believe MAD are behind

programme.title: Hercules 212
programme.desc: Hercules 212

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A high profile mission to Mars is suddenly canceled much to the dismay of the public Involved air force captain Paul Chandler steals Lilis shuttle

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: As the aliens are losing the fight and dying off they decide to use spores to kill off all native life on Earth

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: While exploring an Earth-type world several Alphans including Commander Koenig and Dr Russel disappear after sighting a strange fog Shortly afterwards a race of primitive humans are encountered

programme.title: Solar Crisis
programme.desc: A huge Solar flare is predicted to fry Earth Astronauts must fly to the sun to drop a talking bomb Freddy at the right time so the flare will point somewhere else Giant IXL Corp CEO Teague thinks the flare wont happen and wants the mission to fail so he can buy the planet cheaply while the scare lasts

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The Dukes efforts to reform old-time moonshiner Hard Luck Jones runs into plenty of roadblocks when he hijacks a tank to use as a rolling brewery Bo and Luke have to convince Jones to stop his illegal activities before they wind up in federal prison

programme.title: Hercules 204
programme.desc: Hercules 204

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A wealthy woman whose daughter is kidnapped and held for ransom has more faith in a female psychic than Stone and Keller

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IMFs target is Poltroni an international drug dealer Poltroni alias Ted Carson is in a country with no extradition treaty with the United States Briggs devises a plan to lure Poltroni to a neighboring country where he can be arrested and sent to the US To execute the scheme Barney will have to fight for his life against one of Poltronis thugs while Cinammon will be bait for Poltroni Also getting Poltroni to the border wont be easy Its about 100 miles away

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A woman invites Friday and Gannon to talk to her Womans Club about battered children They train the women to be on the lookout for children who might be abused and how they can help by becoming foster parents

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon go undercover at a hotel to find the location of an illegal gambling operation Soon after spreading the word theyre looking for some action they are driven to a late-night game in the Hollywood Hills After the game the detectives give the location of the residence to their boss and a raid is set for the following night

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While fleeing authorities Dr Kimble discovers a man who is deathly ill and is also being pursued by the law

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: 25 men have died in a cave-in at the Dutton Mine in which the Barkleys have a 40 interest Heath on his way to meet Nick and investigate the disaster is badly wounded-and mistaken by the vengeful townspeople as an avenging mine payroll robber

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne meets a sheriff he admires and a town he likes so he decides to stick around When he finds he has an agenda too that involves a pretty woman and some easy money he has second thoughts and a decision to make

programme.title: Dawn of the Dead
programme.desc: During an escalating zombie epidemic two Philadelphia SWAT team members a traffic reporter and his TV executive girlfriend seek refuge in a secluded shopping mall

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.desc: King Henry II of England comes to terms with his affection for his close friend and confidant Thomas Becket who finds his true honor by observing Gods divine will rather than the Kings

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: To lure Jayce to his death Saw Boss puts a marker in the shape of the root on an ice planet that is about to be destroyed by a volcano Herc lands the Pride on the ice which is then nearly covered by an avalanche The native people seek help from Jayce and everyone goes to work building an ice dam and storing up snow to drop into the volcano Monster Minds attack complicating things but they end up helping the people when their lasers blast the dam which prevents the volcano from erupting when all the ice covers it up

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Researchers in Africa discover a Golden Scarab which they believe to be part of a hidden treasure that belonged to a lost tribe of Egypt Of course VENOM is after the treasure themselves Sly Rax accidentally triggers an ancient device in an underground lake that creates an opening in the walls of Solomons Gorge and reveals the treasure MASK must stop VENOM from escaping with the treasure

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Thrity years ago Andrew Trakker received a valuable crystal from a tribe of New Guinea mud-men Now having learned the secret of its power and used it to benefit mankind Andrews son Matt is returning it

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Evil The Resurrected Devil

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Clash! The Old Red Enemy

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kid Icarus feels awful because his height is a problem Duke discovers a magic lamp and the genie grants Kid Icaruss wish to become bigger Kid Icarus turns into a giant and comes to realize that being bigger has a lot of disadvantages

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Hank Sheila Presto Eric and Diana are captured by Venger and thrown into a volcanic prison Its up to Bobby to save them with some help from one of Vengers unwilling servants

programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brains Caribbean holiday is interrupted by a gang of MAD pirates

programme.desc: Cy-Kill and Dr Braxis join forces to steal an experimental energy crystal

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Leader-1 is shot by Crasher while attempting to destroy Cy-Kills pulsar generator

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years
